text:
Once upon a time there was a very curious little hedgehog.

Whenever this little hedgehog would notice something out of the ordinary happening around the countryside, it would investigate.

One day, while browsing some berries - that's right - it stumbled upon this old, gnarly branch.

Something caught its attention. There sat a hummingbird.

Every time this hummingbird fluttered its wings, berries would fall.

You could gather berries that way, right?

Certainly!

So this hummingbird every day would pick those berries...

But those berries weren't very flavorful.

Hummingbirds aren't berries. Those birds collect nectar.

You collect nectar?

You sure could!<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
